title: spachia fulgens
side_effects: Spachia fulgens can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea and dizziness in some individuals, particularly those with pre-existing stomach issues or a history of balance problems. Prolonged use of the plant can also lead to kidney damage and liver strain, which may result in symptoms like dark urine, pale skin, and fatigue. In rare cases, improper use of Spachia fulgens can trigger allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Furthermore, excessive consumption of the plant may also cause irregular heartbeat and other cardiovascular issues.
